Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Seven-Year Festival]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — The Seven-Year Festival is an event where Kelsa will fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — Kelsa represents her family in the Festival.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — The Seven-Year Festival is an event where clans show their power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 7''' — The Wei clan hosted the Seven-Year Festival this year.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 8''' — The Seven-Year Festival is a time when the clans of Sacred Valley compete against one another.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 9''' — The Seven-Year Festival includes important events that take place once guests have settled in.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — The Seven-Year Festival features an arena.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — The Seven-Year Festival was an event where the Kazan and Li clans marched through the main thoroughfare.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — The last Seven-Year Festival was fought in an arena that the Titan kicked aside.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — The Seven-Year Festival is happening next year.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — The Seven-Year Festival is an event hosted by clans.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
